    R

    RateLimitingService - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.security
    Service for applying rate limiting based on client IP addresses.

    READ_ACKNOWLEDGE - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.TrainingCompletionType
    The user must read and acknowledge the document.
    RECEPTION - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.ModuleType
    Module related to reception or front desk operations.
    register(RegisterRequest) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.auth.AuthenticationController
    Registers a new user account and returns a JWT token.
    register(RegisterRequest) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.auth.AuthenticationService
    Registers a new user and returns a JWT token.

    Request body for the user registration endpoint.

    Creates and saves a new deviation report for the user's organization.

    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a generated report.

    resolveBucket(String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.RateLimitingService
    Resolves the bucket associated with the given IP address.
    RESOLVED - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.DeviationStatus
    The deviation has been resolved and no further action is required.
    ResourceConflictException - Exception Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.exception
    Exception thrown when a request results in a resource conflict.

    Constructs a new ResourceConflictException with the specified detail message.
    ResourceNotFoundException - Exception Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.exception
    Exception thrown when a requested resource cannot be found.

    Constructs a new ResourceNotFoundException with the specified detail message.

    Enumeration representing user roles within the system.

    Runs on application startup and populates the database with test data.
